title: Youtube Boost
description: Supercharge your channel's visibility and authority. Whether you're a new creator looking for your first 1,000 subscribers or an established brand aiming for viral status, our YouTube Boost services provide the high-quality engagement signals—Views, Subscribers, Likes, and Comments—needed to trigger the YouTube algorithm and reach a global audience.
instructions:
Select Your Package: Choose the number of views, subs, or likes you need.

Provide URL: Paste your Video Link (for views/likes/comments) or Channel Link (for subscribers).

Start Time: Most services begin within 1–12 hours.

Wait for Completion: Growth will appear gradually. Do not buy from other providers at the same time to avoid tracking errors.
terms:
Public Settings: Your video and subscriber count must be set to Public for the service to work.

No Refill Policy: For "Economy" packages, once delivered, no replacements are provided for natural drops. (Check for "Refill" badges on premium tiers).

Link Accuracy: You must provide the correct Video or Channel URL. No refunds for incorrect links.

Account Safety: Our methods are 100% external and do not require your password.
faq:
Q: Can these views get my channel banned?

A: No. We use safe, external marketing methods that comply with safety standards. We never ask for your password.

Q: Do these subscribers watch my new videos?

A: These are "Social Proof" subscribers meant to boost your numbers. For active fans, focus on creating high-quality content once your numbers look professional.

Q: How long does it take to see results?

A: Initial start is usually under 6 hours, with full delivery depending on the size of the package.

Q: Can I get monetized with these?

A: These services help you reach the 1,000 sub / 4,000 hour milestones. However, your content must still pass YouTube's manual review for monetization.

title: Youtube Premium
description: Unlock the ultimate YouTube experience. Watch your favorite creators without a single ad, play videos in the background while using other apps, and download content for offline viewing. Includes YouTube Music Premium and enhanced 1080p Premium bitrate for crystal-clear quality.
instructions:

Activation: Once joined, the "Premium" logo will appear in the top-left corner of your YouTube app.
terms:

Usage: No changing the account password or email if using a shared slot.

Refill: 30-day warranty provided for premium status. No refill for "Economy" non-guaranteed slots.

Region: Accounts are Global; no VPN required for daily use.
faq:
Q: Will I lose my playlists? * A: If you join via an invitation link, your playlists remain on your personal account.

Q: Can I use it on multiple devices? * A: Yes, you can log in on your phone, TV, and PC simultaneously.

Q: Can I analyze files? * A: Yes, you can upload up to 20 files at once for data analysis and PDF reading.

title: Facebook Products
description: Boost your Facebook Page or Post authority with fast Followers, Likes, and Views. Build instant social proof and improve your brand's credibility at the best price. Economy Tier: No refill or guarantee provided for drops—our most budget-friendly option. Safe, secure, and easy—no password needed, just your public link to start growing.
instructions:
Page Followers/Likes: Provide your Facebook Page URL (e.g., facebook.com/YourPageName).

Post Likes/Views: Provide the direct link to the specific post or video.

Check Privacy: Ensure the "Follow" button is visible to everyone in your Page settings.

Wait for Start: Delivery usually begins within 1–12 hours depending on current server load.
terms:
No Refill / Non-Guaranteed: This is an economy-tier service. We do not provide free replacements (refills) if the number of followers, likes, or views drops after the service is completed.

Public Settings: The Page or Post must be set to Public and have no age/country restrictions. If "Public" is not enabled, the order will fail.

Link Accuracy: Double-check your link. We cannot cancel or change an order once the delivery process has started.

Potential Drop: Expect a natural drop of 5% to 20% over time. We recommend ordering slightly more than your target to account for this.
faq:
Q: What is the difference between Page Likes and Followers?

A: Page Likes usually include a Follow, but "Followers" only increase the follower count. Our service targets whichever link you provide.

Q: Why are my likes dropping?

A: Facebook occasionally cleans "ghost" or inactive accounts. Because this is an Economy service, we do not offer refills for these removals.

Q: Can I use this for a Facebook Group?

A: No. This service is for Pages and Public Profiles only. Group member services are sold separately.

title: Instagram Products

Public Account Required: Your Instagram account must remain Public until the order is fully completed. Setting it to Private will cause the order to fail.

No Link Changes: Once the order is submitted, the link cannot be changed. Ensure the username or post link is 100% correct.

Expected Drop: Due to Instagram's periodic updates, a drop of 5% to 25% is possible. Please purchase a slightly higher amount if you need a specific final number.
faq:
Q: Why do followers drop?

A: Instagram regularly removes inactive accounts. Since this is an economy service, we do not replace these accounts if they are removed.

Q: Can I buy this for a new account?

A: Yes, but we recommend having at least 3–5 posts and a profile picture to make the growth look more natural.

Q: Will this affect my engagement?

A: These services are for Social Proof (making your numbers look higher). They do not guarantee comments or shares from the new followers.

title: Spotify Premium
description: Upgrade your own Spotify account to Premium at a fraction of the official price. Keep all your playlists and liked songs while enjoying ad-free, high-quality offline music. Choose from 1-month to 12-month plans with a full-period replacement warranty. Safe and secure activation via Invite Link or Direct Login.
instructions:
If Providing Account Access:

Provide your Spotify Email and Password to the MYOOREDOO team.

Temporarily disable 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication) if active.

If Joining via Invite Link:

You will receive a Family Invite Link and a Home Address.

Click the link, log into your account, and enter the exact address provided to verify your "residency" with the family.

Completion: Once the status shows "Premium," you can change your password (if you provided login access) and enjoy ad-free music.
terms:
Upgrade Method: This is usually done by adding the customer's account to a Family Plan or Duo Plan.

12-Month Rule: Spotify only allows an account to switch Family/Duo plans once every 12 months. If the customer joined a different family plan recently, the upgrade will fail.

Region Matching: The account's country must match the "Family Manager's" country. If they don't match, you (the seller) will need to change the account's region settings during the upgrade.

No Changes: If you provide a pre-made account, the customer must not change the email or billing info, or they will lose their warranty.

Privacy: Other members of a Family plan cannot see the customer's playlists, liked songs, or listening history.
faq:
Q: Will I keep my playlists?

A: Yes! Since your own account is being upgraded, all your songs, playlists, and "Made For You" mixes stay exactly where they are.

Q: Why does it say "You're trying to join a plan in a different country"?

A: This means your account region doesn't match the plan. You must change your region in "Account Settings" to match the invite link's country.

Q: What happens after the 1, 6, or 12 months?

A: Your account will return to the "Free" version. You will need to purchase another upgrade from MYOOREDOO to stay Premium.

title: Netflix
description: Instant access to a pre-activated Netflix Premium 4K HDR account. No gift card redemption required—just log in with the provided email and password. Includes full-period warranty and dedicated support for a hassle-free streaming experience.
instructions:
Receive Credentials: After purchase on MYOOREDOO, the customer receives an Email and Password.

Login: Go to the Netflix app or website and enter the provided details.

Select Profile: If it is a shared account, the customer must only enter the specific Profile Name assigned to them (e.g., "Profile 1" or "Customer A").

Set Profile PIN: (Optional) If allowed, customers can set a 4-digit PIN on their specific profile to keep their "Must Watch" list private.
terms:
Account Type: Specify if it is a Private Account (customer owns the whole account) or a Shared Profile (customer gets 1 profile on a 5-profile account).

Household Rules: To avoid "Incorrect Household" errors, users should only use the account on the number of devices allowed by their specific plan.

No Changes Allowed: For shared accounts, customers are strictly forbidden from changing the Account Email, Password, or Billing Settings. Doing so usually voids the warranty.

Warranty: Provide a "Full Period Warranty." If the account stops working before the 30 days are up, you provide a replacement or a "fix."
faq:
Q: Why does it say "Too many people are using the account"?

A: This happens if more than the allowed number of screens are active. On a Shared Profile, ensure only one device is streaming at a time.

Q: Can I use this on my Smart TV?

A: Yes, but if the account is from a different region, Netflix might ask to "Update Household." In this case, the customer may need to follow specific "Home Location" verification steps you provide.

Q: What happens after 1 month?

A: Since this is "via account," the login will expire. The customer will need to purchase a new "Account" or "Renewal" from your site to continue.

title: Discord Effects
description: Personalize your profile forever with permanent Avatar Decorations and Profile Effects. Delivered as an instant Gift Link—no account login required for activation. Items are yours to keep permanently, even after the gift link is used. Requires a Nitro subscription to equip and display your items to the community.
instructions:
Receive the Gift Link (starts with discord.gift/) from MYOOREDOO.

Open the link in a browser where you are logged into Discord or paste it directly into a Discord chat and click "Accept."

To apply the item: Go to User Settings > Profiles.

Click Change Decoration or Change Effect to see your new permanent item in your collection.

3. Types of Shop Items
Avatar Decorations: Animated or static frames that sit around your profile picture (e.g., Cyberpunk, Fantasy, or Anime themes).

Profile Effects: Large, full-screen animations that trigger when someone clicks your profile (e.g., falling Sakura petals or glitch effects).

Nameplates: Decorative banners or icons that appear next to your username (released in late 2025/early 2026 as a new shop category).
terms:
Permanent Ownership: Unlike Nitro, once a Gift Link for an Avatar Decoration or Profile Effect is redeemed, the item belongs to that account forever. It does not expire.

Nitro Not Required to Keep: You do not need an active Nitro subscription to keep or own the item, but you usually need Nitro to equip and use it.

Non-Refundable: Once a Gift Link is generated and sent, it cannot be canceled or refunded by the seller.

Single Use: Each Gift Link can only be redeemed by one Discord account.
faq:
Q: Can I use the decoration if my Nitro expires?

A: Generally, no. While you own the item permanently, Discord currently requires an active Nitro subscription (Basic or Gaming) to actually display the decorations to others.

Q: Do these links expire?

A: Gift Links stay valid until they are redeemed. However, once redeemed, the link becomes "Unknown Gift Code."

Q: Can I trade the item after I redeem it?

A: No. Once added to your collection, the item is locked to your account and cannot be moved or traded.

title: Discord Boosts
description: Instantly upgrade any Discord server to Level 3 with a 14x Boost package. Unlock 384Kbps audio, 100MB uploads, and a custom vanity URL for your community. Choose between 1-month or 3-month durations with guaranteed stable delivery. Requires a permanent server invite link; do not kick booster accounts after joining.
instructions:
Provide Invite Link: The customer must provide a Permanent Invite Link (Never Expire / No Limit).

Disable Protections: Temporarily turn off "Anti-Raid" bots or "Verify to Join" gates so the booster accounts can enter.

Delivery Time: Most services take 30 minutes to 24 hours to fully reflect all 14 boosts.

Do Not Kick: Advise the customer not to kick the new accounts that join; these are the "boosters" holding up the server level.
terms:
Duration-Based: Boosts are not permanent. A 1-Month or 3-Month package means the server will keep its level only for that specific period.

Server Levels: * Level 1: 2 Boosts

Level 2: 7 Boosts

Level 3: 14 Boosts

Non-Refundable: Once boosts are applied to a server, they cannot be retracted or refunded.

Bot/Account Method: Most 3rd-party "Boost Packages" (like 14x Boosts) work by having automated accounts join the server. If these accounts are kicked or banned by server admins, the boosts will be lost instantly.

2. 1-Month vs. 3-Month Packages
1-Month Boosts: Best for short-term events, tournaments, or testing out Level 3 features.

3-Month Boosts: More cost-effective for established communities. It ensures the server stays at Level 3 for a full quarter without needing to renew every 30 days.

Streak Badges: The "Server Booster" badge on a user's profile evolves based on how long they have continuously boosted a server. If the 1-month or 3-month package expires and is not renewed within 72 hours, the streak resets.
faq:
Q: Can I move the boosts to another server?

A: For official Nitro boosts, yes (7-day cooldown). For 3rd-party "14x Boost" packages, no. They are locked to the link provided at purchase.

Q: What happens when the 3 months are over?

A: The accounts will leave the server, and the server level will drop back to its original state unless a new package is purchased.

Q: Does this include Nitro for my account?

A: No. Server Boosts only upgrade the Server. They do not give the buyer Nitro features (like animated avatars or larger file uploads for their own profile).

title: Discord Nitro
description: Get the full Discord experience with Nitro Gaming or Basic. 1-Month and 3-Month Promo links are for new/eligible accounts only. Ensure you haven't had Nitro in the last 12 months before purchasing a promo. "Via Login" activation requires temporary account access for guaranteed delivery.
instructions:
Instructions (How to Redeem)
For Gift Links: Simply click the link while logged into Discord and click "Accept Gift."

For Promo Links: * Open the link in a browser where you are logged into the correct Discord account.

Ensure no other Nitro is active on the account.

Add a payment method if prompted (you can remove it after activation).

For "Via Login": Provide the account details to the MYOOREDOO secure system and ensure Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) is temporarily disabled or the backup code is provided.
terms:
1-Month & 3-Month Promo Links (Important)
When you sell "Promo" or "Trial" links (often from partnerships like Xbox, YouTube, or Twitch), the following rules apply:

⚠️ The "New User" Rule
1-Month & 3-Month Promo Links can ONLY be activated on accounts that have never had Nitro before.

Restriction: If the account has had any Nitro subscription (Nitro, Nitro Classic, or Nitro Basic) in the last 12 months, the link will not work.

No Active Subs: You cannot activate these links if you currently own Nitro. You must wait for your current sub to expire, and even then, the "12-month rule" usually applies to these specific promo links.

🔑 "Via Login" Activation
For links that require "Via Login" (Direct Activation):

The Process: The seller/system needs to log into the Discord account to bypass certain regional or payment hurdles.

Requirement: The user must provide their login credentials or scan a QR code.

Payment Method: Even though the link is "free" or "pre-paid," Discord often requires a valid credit card or PayPal to be linked to the account to "verify" the user (it won't charge until the trial ends).
faq:
FAQ for your Customers
Q: Why does it say "Unknown Gift Code"?

A: This usually means the link has already been claimed or has expired.

Q: Why does it say "You are ineligible"?

A: This means you have had Nitro in the past 12 months. This link is only for users who haven't had a subscription recently.

Q: Will I be charged after the 1 or 3 months?

A: Yes, Discord will try to renew the sub. You must cancel the subscription in "User Settings > Subscriptions" immediately after activating to avoid future charges.

title: Free Fire Member
description: The best value for Free Fire: Get up to 4x more Diamonds compared to standard top-ups. Choose Weekly for a quick boost or Monthly for long-term savings and exclusive VIP rewards.
instructions:
Copy your Free Fire Player ID from your in-game profile.

On MYOOREDOO, select the Weekly or Monthly Membership option.

Paste your Player ID and complete the payment.

The "Instant" Diamonds will be added to your account immediately.

Go to the Membership Tab in-game daily to claim your remaining Diamonds.
terms:
ID-Based Activation: Memberships are activated directly via your Player ID. Ensure the ID is 100% correct, as the subscription cannot be transferred or refunded.

Daily Claim Requirement: You must log in every day to claim your daily Diamonds. If you miss a day, you can "check-in" later using Gold, but it is best to claim them daily to maximize value.

Non-Stackable Benefits: While you can buy both a Weekly and Monthly membership at the same time (Super Membership), you cannot buy two of the same membership to double your daily rewards; it will simply extend the duration.

Reset Time: Daily rewards reset every day at 03:00 (Server Time).


Weekly	80 - 100	50 / day	~430 - 450	7 Days
Monthly	400 - 500	50 / day	~1,900 - 2,000	30 Days
Note: If you have both active, you unlock Super Membership benefits, which include extra daily Diamond rewards and a special "Super Member" icon.
faq:
Q: Can I buy a Membership for a friend?

A: Yes. Since it is ID-based, you just need to enter your friend's Player ID during the checkout process on your site.

Q: What happens if I forget to claim my Diamonds?

A: You can usually reclaim missed daily rewards within 7 days via in-game mail or by using Gold for a "make-up" check-in.

Q: Is there a "Weekly Lite" version?

A: Yes, in some regions, a "Weekly Lite" exists which provides fewer total Diamonds (approx. 90) at a much lower price point.

title: Free Fire Diamonds
description: Instantly recharge Free Fire Diamonds via Player ID to unlock the Booyah Pass and rare skins. Safe, secure, and fast delivery directly to your account—the best way to level up your game.
instructions:
Open Free Fire and tap your Avatar (top-left).

In the "Gallery" tab, find your Player ID (a string of 8–12 numbers) and click the Copy icon.

On MYOOREDOO or an authorized partner like Garena’s Shop2Game:

Select the Free Fire game icon.

Choose Player ID Login and paste your ID.

Select your Diamond pack and complete the payment.

Diamonds will appear in your in-game balance instantly.
terms:
Player ID Accuracy: Diamonds are delivered directly to the account associated with the Player ID provided. Once the recharge is processed, it is impossible to reverse the transaction or move the Diamonds to another account.

Region Restrictions: Most ID-based recharges are region-specific (e.g., MENA, India, Global). Ensure the recharge package matches the server your account is registered on.

Non-Refundable: All digital Diamond top-ups are final and non-refundable.

Safety Warning: Avoid using unofficial tools or "hacks" that promise free diamonds; only use authorized ID-based top-up services to prevent account suspension.
faq:
Q: How do I verify my ID is correct?

A: Authorized top-up sites will display your In-Game Nickname after you enter your Player ID. Always check that the name matches yours before paying.

Q: Can I get the "First Top-Up" bonus?

A: Yes, ID-based recharges typically trigger in-game events like the "First Top-Up Bonus" or "Cumulative Top-Up" rewards.

Q: Why are my diamonds not showing?

A: It can take up to 15 minutes during peak times. If they don't appear, restart the game or check your in-game mail.

title: PUBG Mobile UC
description: The premium currency for PUBG Mobile to unlock the Royale Pass and legendary weapon skins. Fast, secure top-ups via Player ID to get your UC and start opening crates immediately.
instructions:
Open PUBG Mobile and tap your Avatar (top-left). Copy your Player ID (a long string of numbers).

If you have a Digital Code (PIN): Visit the official redemption site (usually Midasbuy).

Log in, enter your Player ID, and select Redeem.

Paste your 16-character PIN and click OK. The UC will reflect in your in-game balance instantly.
terms:
Player ID (UID) Verification: UC is credited directly to your account via your Player ID. It is your responsibility to provide the correct ID; once UC is sent to an ID, it cannot be transferred or refunded.

Region Compatibility: While many UC codes are "Global," some are region-locked (e.g., Turkey, Middle East). Always ensure the product matches your account's region to avoid redemption errors.

Non-Refundable: Digital UC codes and direct top-ups are considered final sales.

Usage Policy: UC cannot be exchanged for real money or transferred between different game accounts.
faq:
Q: Where can I find my Player ID?

A: Tap your profile icon; your ID is listed right above your level. Use the "Copy" button to ensure accuracy.

Q: Does UC expire?

A: No, once UC is in your game account, it stays there until you spend it.

Q: Can I use this for PUBG Mobile KR or VN?

A: No. Global UC codes generally do not work on the Korean (KR) or Vietnamese (VN) versions of the game.

Q: What is the "Purchase Bonus"?

A: Frequent events in-game give extra items or UC for reaching certain top-up milestones. Direct top-ups usually count toward these events.

title: Blood Strike Golds
description: Premium currency for Blood Strike to unlock exclusive Strikers, Ultra-tier skins, and the Strike Pass. Fast and secure UID-based top-up to boost your Gold balance and dominate the battlefield.
instructions:
Open Blood Strike and tap your Avatar (top-left) to find and copy your UID.

Go to the in-game Gold Shop or an authorized web portal (like NetEase GamesClub).

Select the desired Gold amount (e.g., 100, 500, or 2500 Gold).

Enter your UID and select your Server.

Complete the payment. The Gold should appear in your in-game balance within 1–5 minutes.
terms:
UID-Based Top-up: Most Gold purchases are made using your User ID (UID). Ensure this is copied correctly, as top-ups to the wrong UID cannot be reversed or refunded.

Server Specific: Gold is tied to your specific server (MENA, SEA, LATAM, etc.). If you play on the MENA server, ensure you are purchasing a global or MENA-compatible top-up.

Non-Refundable: Once the Gold is credited to your account and reflects in your balance, it is non-refundable and cannot be converted back into cash.

Authorized Sellers: NetEase (the developer) strictly monitors third-party top-ups. Using unauthorized "cheap" top-up services can result in a "Negative Gold" balance or a permanent account ban.
faq:
Q: Where is the best place to find my UID?

A: It is located on your profile page under your name. There is a small "Copy" icon next to the long string of numbers.

Q: Why didn't I get my first-purchase bonus?

A: First-purchase double-gold bonuses are usually only available for in-game purchases. Some third-party web shops do not support this specific event.

Q: Can I send Gold directly to a friend?

A: No, you cannot transfer Gold between accounts. However, you can use your friend's UID to buy Gold for them directly via a top-up shop.

title: Blood Strike Strike Pass
description: Unlock exclusive Ultra skins, executions, and weapon camos with the Blood Strike seasonal pass. Complete the Elite track to earn back your Gold and fund your next season for free!
instructions:
Find your UID: Tap your Avatar in the top-left corner of the main lobby. Copy the User ID (UID) displayed.

Purchase: Buy the "Strike Pass Elite" or "Premium" pack from the in-game shop or an authorized reseller like NetEase GamesClub.

Activation:

If bought in-game: It activates instantly.

If bought via UID top-up: The pass will be credited directly to your account. Check your in-game Inbox or the Strike Pass tab to see the "Elite" status unlocked.

Level Up: Complete daily and weekly missions to earn XP and unlock the rewards.
terms:
Two Paid Tiers: There are two premium versions: Elite (standard premium rewards) and Premium (includes additional instant levels and exclusive "Ultra" rewards).

Gold Refund Policy: If you purchase the Elite Strike Pass (approx. 520 Gold), you can earn back your full 520 Gold by completing the pass milestones, essentially making the next season's pass "free" if you finish.

Non-Refundable: Once a Strike Pass is activated on an account, it cannot be refunded or transferred.

MENA Restrictions: As of early 2026, some third-party top-up sites have temporary restrictions for the MENA (Middle East and North Africa) server. Always check server compatibility before purchasing.
faq:
Q: What is the difference between Elite and Premium?

A: Elite unlocks the premium reward track. Premium usually grants an instant +20 Level boost and exclusive Ultra-grade skins (like the "Sea Wraith" M4A1) not available in the Elite tier.

Q: Can I upgrade from Elite to Premium later?

A: Yes, you can usually pay the difference in Gold to upgrade to the Premium tier at any point during the season.

Q: What happens if I don't finish the pass?

A: You will only keep the rewards for the levels you reached. You will not receive the full Gold refund unless you reach the final "Gold refund" milestones.

title: Xbox Gift Card (USD)
description: The ultimate gift for gamers: add USD credit to your US Microsoft account for games, apps, and hardware. Instant digital delivery with no expiry—buy the latest titles or hardware directly from the Microsoft Store.
instructions:
Via Browser (Easiest): Go to microsoft.com/redeem and log into your US account.

On Xbox Series X|S or One: Open the Store app, press the View button (or navigate to the sidebar), and select Redeem.

On Windows PC: Open the Microsoft Store app, click your Profile icon, and select Redeem code or gift cards.

Enter the 25-character code (it automatically adds dashes) and click Confirm.
terms:
Region Locked: This card is strictly for United States (US) Microsoft accounts. It will not work on accounts registered in other regions like the UK, Europe, or Tunisia.

Currency Match: The account's store currency must be in USD. Microsoft does not support automatic currency conversion for gift cards.

No Expiration: Funds added via retail gift cards do not expire. (Note: Promotional credits from Microsoft Rewards usually expire within 90 days).

Non-Refundable: Once the 25-character code is redeemed, the balance cannot be refunded, transferred to another account, or exchanged for cash.

Usage Limits: The balance can be used for games, DLC, movies, and apps, but some in-app subscriptions may still require a secondary credit card on file for recurring billing.
faq:
Q: Can I buy a physical Xbox Console with this?

A: Yes. Once redeemed to your Microsoft account, you can use the balance at the online Microsoft Store to buy hardware like consoles, controllers, and Surface devices (US shipping addresses only).

Q: Why does it say "Code not found"?

A: Double-check that you are entering the 25-character PIN and not the Serial Number. Ensure your account region is set to the United States.

Q: Can I use this for Xbox Game Pass?

A: Yes, you can use your account balance to pay for Game Pass Ultimate, PC Game Pass, or Game Pass Core.

title: Xbox Games Pass (Global)
description: Instant access to hundreds of high-quality games on Xbox and PC, including new releases on day one. The "Ultimate" gaming subscription featuring online multiplayer, EA Play, and exclusive member discounts.

subProducts.title: Xbox Game Pass Ultimate 1 Month Trial

instructions:
Via Web (Recommended): Go to redeem.microsoft.com, log in, and enter the 25-character code.

On Xbox Console: Press the Xbox button > Store > Redeem.

On Windows PC: Open the Microsoft Store or Xbox App, click your profile, and select Redeem code or gift cards.

Confirm the subscription details and ensure the "Recurring Billing" setting is to your preference before finishing.
terms:
Subscription Model: This is a digital code for a specific duration (e.g., 1, 3, or 12 months). It grants access to the Game Pass library for that period only.

Auto-Renewal: Once the code expires, the subscription will automatically renew at the standard monthly rate unless Recurring Billing is turned off in the Microsoft account settings.

Non-Stackable Trials: If a code is labeled as a "Trial" or "New Customer Only," it cannot be redeemed on an account that has previously had Game Pass.

Conversion Rules: Redeeming an Ultimate code while you have an active "Core" (formerly Gold) or "Standard" subscription will convert your remaining time to Ultimate based on Microsoft’s current conversion ratio.
faq:
Q: Is "Global" truly work everywhere? * A: While the code is not region-locked, it can only be activated in countries where Xbox Live services are officially supported. (e.g., It may not work in unsupported regions like Tunisia without account adjustments).

Q: Does it include EA Play?

A: Yes, the Ultimate and PC versions include an EA Play membership at no extra cost.

Q: Can I use this on both PC and Console?

A: Only the Xbox Game Pass Ultimate tier allows you to play on both. The "PC" or "Core" tiers are restricted to their specific platforms.

title: Itunes Gift Card (USD)
description: One card for everything Apple: buy apps, games, music, and movies, or pay for iCloud+ and Apple Music. Instant digital delivery for the US App Store—the safest way to shop without a credit card.
instructions:
On iPhone/iPad: Open the App Store, tap your Photo/Profile icon at the top, and select Redeem Gift Card or Code.

On Mac: Open the App Store, click your name/sign-in button in the sidebar, and select Redeem Gift Card.

On Windows: Open the Apple Music or Apple TV app, click your name at the bottom of the sidebar, and select Redeem.

Enter the 16-digit code (starts with an "X") manually or use your camera to scan it.
terms:
Region Restricted: These cards are valid only for purchases made in the United States from Apple properties (App Store, iTunes, apple.com). They cannot be redeemed on accounts set to any other country.

Account Ownership: To redeem, you must have a valid Apple Account and be at least 13 years old.

Non-Refundable: Once purchased, gift cards cannot be returned, refunded, or exchanged for cash (except where required by law).

No Expiration: Apple Gift Cards do not have an expiration date.

Privacy & Security: Apple is not responsible for lost or stolen cards. Beware of scams; Apple Gift Cards can only be used to buy Apple products and services.
faq:
Q: Can I use this for iCloud+ or Apple Music?

A: Yes! Once redeemed, your balance is used automatically for any Apple subscriptions, including iCloud+, Apple Arcade, and Apple TV+.

Q: Can I use a USD card in another country if I change my region?

A: Apple generally requires a local payment method to change regions. It is highly recommended to use these only if your account is already set to the US.

Q: What is the difference between this and an "App Store & iTunes" card?

A: The newer "Apple Gift Card" (white logo) can be used for both digital content and physical hardware at the Apple Store. Older "iTunes" cards are typically for digital content only.

title: PlayStation Gift Cards (TRY)
description: The best way to fund your Turkish PSN account and access the store's regional deals and PS Plus. Instant digital delivery of TRY credit with no credit card required—perfect for all PS4 and PS5 players.
instructions:
Log into your Turkish PSN account on your console or at store.playstation.com.

On PS5: Settings > Users and Accounts > Account > Payment and Subscriptions > Redeem Codes.

On PS4: Go to the PlayStation Store, scroll to the bottom of the sidebar, and select Redeem Codes.

Enter the 12-digit PIN and confirm. The funds will appear in your wallet instantly.
terms:
Region Locked: These codes are strictly for PlayStation Network (PSN) accounts registered in Turkey. They will not work on accounts from any other country (e.g., US, UK, or EU).

Currency Requirement: The card must be in Turkish Lira (TRY) and can only be used in the Turkish PlayStation Store.

Non-Refundable: Once the digital PIN is issued, it cannot be returned or exchanged.

Account Consistency: You cannot change the region of an existing account to Turkey. You must have a Turkish account from the start to use these cards.

12-Month Validity: While many PSN cards don't expire, some Turkish vouchers are noted to have a 12-month validity from the date of purchase. It is best to redeem them immediately.
faq:
Q: Can I use these for PS Plus subscriptions in Turkey?

A: Yes, once the TRY balance is in your wallet, you can use it to pay for PS Plus Essential, Extra, or Premium. Note that "stacking" multiple years of subscriptions is sometimes limited by Sony.

Q: Why does my code show as "invalid"?

A: This usually happens if your account is not set to Turkey. Check your "Region of Residence" in your account settings. Also, ensure you are entering the 12-digit code without dashes.

Q: Can I play games bought on my Turkish account on my main (US/EU) account?

A: Yes, as long as your console is set as the "Primary Console" (or "Console Sharing and Offline Play" is enabled) for the Turkish account.

title: PlayStation Gift Cards (USD)
description: The easiest way to fund your US PlayStation Store account for games, DLC, and PS Plus. Instant digital delivery for safe, credit-card-free shopping on all your favorite PlayStation titles.
instructions:
On PS5: Go to Settings > Users and Accounts > Account > Payment and Subscriptions > Redeem Codes.

On PS4: Go to the PlayStation Store > scroll to the bottom of the sidebar > Redeem Codes.

On Web: Visit store.playstation.com, click your Avatar, and select Redeem Code.

Carefully enter the 12-digit PIN and select Redeem. The funds are added instantly.
terms:
Region Restricted: This card is strictly for US PlayStation Network (PSN) accounts. It will not work on accounts registered in the UK, Europe, Turkey, or any other region.

Account Locking: Once you set the country of your PSN account during setup, it cannot be changed. To use this card, you must have an account specifically set to the United States.

No Expiration: The funds in your PSN wallet do not expire once redeemed.

Wallet Limits: There is a maximum limit on how much a PSN wallet can hold (typically $250 USD).

Non-Refundable: Digital codes cannot be returned or exchanged once the PIN is revealed.
faq:
Q: Can I use this for PlayStation Plus?

A: Yes! Once the funds are in your wallet, you can use them to subscribe to PS Plus (Essential, Extra, or Premium) or buy games and DLC.

Q: Why does it say "Code is invalid or already redeemed"?

A: First, double-check that your account region is definitely set to the US. Second, ensure you aren't confusing "0" (zero) with "O" (letter) or "1" (one) with "I" (letter).

Q: Can I use this on a Child Account?

A: Usually, no. Child accounts don't have their own wallets; they use the "Family Manager's" wallet funds. The manager must redeem the code.

title: Steam Gift Cards (CNY)
description: The essential top-up for Steam accounts registered in the Mainland China region. Instant CNY credit for games and DLC with secure digital delivery and no expiration.
instructions:
Launch the Steam client or visit steampowered.com/redeem.

Log into your account (ensure your region is set to China).

Navigate to Account Details > Add funds to your Steam Wallet.

Select Redeem a Steam Gift Card or Wallet Code.

Enter the CNY code precisely and click Continue.
terms:
Region Locked: These codes can only be redeemed on Steam accounts where the store region is set to Mainland China.

Currency Requirement: The account's wallet currency must be CNY. As of 2026, Steam prevents the redemption of physical or digital wallet codes if the currency of the code does not match the account's existing wallet currency.

Mainland vs. Global: These cards are typically intended for the global Steam client (often accessed in China via authorized methods) rather than the "Steam China" (Perfect World) version, which has its own separate library and rules.

No Expiration: Like other regions, CNY codes do not have an expiration date.

Non-Refundable: Once the code is revealed or added to an account, it cannot be refunded or transferred.
faq:
Q: Can I use a CNY card to change my account region to China?

A: No. Steam does not allow the use of gift cards to change your store region. You must have a local Chinese payment method and physical residency to switch your account to the China region.

Q: I am outside China; can I use this card?

A: Only if your account was previously established as a China-region account. If your account is US or EU, the code will be rejected with a "Currency Mismatch" error.

Q: Does this work on "Steam China" (Perfect World)?

A: Generally, yes, but users usually prefer these for the standard Steam client to access a wider library of games.

title: Steam Gift Cards (EU)
description: The perfect way to top up your Eurozone Steam Wallet for games, software, and hardware. Instant digital delivery with no expiration—ideal for EU players and seasonal Steam sales.
instructions:
Open the Steam app or visit steampowered.com/redeem.

Log into your Europe-region account.

Enter your 16-digit code into the "Steam Wallet Code" field.

Click Continue. The balance will be added instantly to your Steam Wallet.
terms:
Currency Match: These cards are typically denominated in Euros (€). They can only be redeemed on Steam accounts where the store currency is also set to EUR.

Regional Lock: Valid only for European Union/Eurozone accounts (e.g., France, Germany, Netherlands, etc.). They will not work on accounts set to the US, UK (GBP), or Turkey (TRY).

No Expiration: Steam Wallet funds and official gift cards do not expire.

Non-Refundable: Once the code is redeemed or the digital PIN is revealed, it cannot be refunded or exchanged for cash.
faq:
Q: Can I use a €20 card in the UK? * A: No. UK accounts use GBP (£). Steam usually blocks redemptions if the card currency (EUR) does not match your account currency.

Q: Can I use this to buy a Steam Deck? * A: Yes, Steam Wallet funds can be used for hardware like the Steam Deck or Valve Index, provided they are available for shipping to your EU address.

Q: What if I have an EU account but I'm currently traveling? * A: As long as your Store Country remains set to an EU nation in your account settings, you can redeem the card from anywhere.

title: Steam Gift Cards (USD)
description: The primary way to fund your US-region Steam Wallet for games, DLC, and hardware. Instant digital delivery with no expiration—perfect for securing the best deals during Steam Sales.
instructions:
Open the Steam client or go to steampowered.com/redeem.

Log into your account.

Click your Profile Name in the top right and select Account Details.

Click Add funds to your Steam Wallet > Redeem a Steam Gift Card or Wallet Code.

Enter the 16-digit code exactly and click Continue.
terms:
Currency Locking: As of 2026, Steam has significantly tightened its regional policies. A USD gift card can typically only be redeemed on accounts where the store currency is set to USD.

Region Match: If you are in a country where the store uses a different local currency (like EUR or TRY), a USD card will often result in a "Currency Mismatch" error.

No Expiration: Steam Wallet funds and Gift Cards do not expire.

Non-Refundable: Once a code is redeemed, the funds are permanently tied to that account and cannot be withdrawn or transferred.
faq:
Q: Can I use a USD card if I’m traveling outside the US?

A: Yes, as long as your account's Store Region is still set to the United States. Steam looks at your account's home region, not your current GPS location.

Q: Will it convert USD to my local currency?

A: In the past, Steam allowed this, but now they generally block redemptions if the card currency doesn't match the account currency to prevent "region hopping" for cheaper games.

Q: Can I buy hardware (like a Steam Deck) with this?

A: Yes! You can use your Steam Wallet balance to purchase games, DLC, and even Valve hardware if it's available in your region.

title: Razer Gold Global
description: The universal currency for gamers: unlock content in over 42,000 games and earn Razer Silver rewards. Secure, instant digital delivery to top up your wallet and access exclusive in-game deals worldwide.
instructions:
Visit gold.razer.com and log into your Razer ID account.

Click on the [Reload] button or the Gold tab and select Reload Now.

Choose Razer Gold PIN as your payment method.

Enter the 16-digit PIN provided (ensure there are no spaces) and click Next.

Complete the 2-step authentication to finalize the top-up.
terms:
Currency & Region: While labeled "Global," these codes are typically denominated in USD. They are most compatible with accounts set to "Global," "United States," or regions that use USD as their primary currency.

Non-Refundable: Once the digital PIN is issued, it cannot be returned, exchanged, or refunded for cash.

Inactivity Fees: Many regions apply an inactivity fee (often 2 EUR/USD or equivalent) if the balance remains untouched for 12 consecutive months.

No Expiration on Gift Cards: Most Razer Gold PINs do not expire, but it is best to redeem them immediately to secure the funds to your account.
faq:
Q: Can I use Razer Gold to buy Razer hardware?

A: No. Credits in your Razer Gold wallet are for digital content only (games, skins, etc.). If you want to buy hardware, you must use a separate Razer.com Gift Card.

Q: What is Razer Silver?

A: It is a loyalty program. Every time you spend Razer Gold, you earn Razer Silver, which can be redeemed for hardware, discount vouchers, or exclusive game keys.

Q: Why is my code not working?

A: Ensure you are entering the PIN, not the Serial Number. Also, check that your account region matches the card's currency (USD Global).

title: Epic Fortnite V Bucks
description: The most flexible way to power up—recharge your Epic balance to buy V-Bucks, Packs, or the Fortnite Crew. Enjoy "Shared Wallet" benefits across PC, Mobile, and Console while earning Epic Rewards on every purchase.
instructions:
Go to epicgames.com/account and log in.

Navigate to the Payment Management section.

Select Add Funds or use a Fortnite/Epic Gift Card at epicgames.com/redeem.

Once the balance shows in your "Epic Wallet," launch Fortnite.

Go to the V-Bucks tab, select your pack, and choose Epic Account Balance as your payment method at checkout
terms:
Region Specific: Your Epic Account Balance is currency-locked. If you recharge in USD, your account must be set to the United States. You cannot use a balance in one currency to buy items in another.

Non-Transferable: Funds added to an Epic Account cannot be moved to another account or withdrawn as cash.

Shared Wallet: V-Bucks purchased via account recharge on PC, Mobile, or Xbox are "Shared." However, V-Bucks purchased or redeemed specifically on Nintendo Switch are locked to that device and won't show up on other platforms.

Wallet Limit: Your total Epic Account Balance cannot exceed $500 USD (or local equivalent) at any time.
faq:
Q: What is the "Exact Amount" feature?

A: If you are short by a small amount of V-Bucks for a specific skin, Fortnite now allows you to "top up" the exact difference in increments of 50 V-Bucks during the checkout process.

Q: Can I buy the Fortnite Crew with my account balance?

A: Yes, but you must ensure you have enough balance to cover the recurring monthly cost, or the subscription will lapse.

Q: Do I get rewards for recharging?

A: Yes! Purchasing V-Bucks or content using your Epic Account Balance qualifies you for Epic Rewards (currently 5% to 20% back in credit, depending on active promotions).

title: Epic > Fortnite Crew
description: The ultimate Fortnite bundle: Get the Battle Pass, 1,000 monthly V-Bucks, and an exclusive Outfit Pack. Enjoy premium rewards across Battle Royale, LEGO Fortnite, Rocket League, and Fortnite Festival.
instructions:
Launch Fortnite on your preferred gaming device.

Navigate to the Battle Pass tab in the top menu.

Click on the Fortnite Crew icon.

Select Join the Fortnite Crew and follow the on-screen prompts to link your payment method.

Note: If you have an Xbox Game Pass Ultimate subscription, Fortnite Crew is often included as a "Perk"—check your Xbox Perks gallery to activate it.
terms:
The Fortnite Crew Subscription is a premium monthly service that offers the best value for dedicated players, bundling several high-value items for a single recurring fee.

1. Terms & Conditions
Recurring Billing: This is a monthly subscription ($11.99/month or equivalent). It automatically renews unless canceled before the next billing date.

Platform Specific: You should purchase the subscription on your "Primary Platform" (the device you play on most). While items are shared across platforms, V-Bucks received from the subscription may be locked to the platform where you purchased it.

Cancellation Policy: You can cancel at any time. You keep all premium rewards you have already claimed, but you will lose access to the Battle Pass and the ability to claim future premium rewards once your current billing month ends.

Age Requirement: You must be the legal age of majority in your country to manage the billing of this subscription.
faq:
Q: What happens if I already bought the Battle Pass?

A: If you subscribe to the Crew after buying the current Battle Pass, you will receive a one-time grant of 950 V-Bucks back to your account.

Q: Do I lose the "Crew Pack" skins if I cancel?

A: No. Any Outfit or accessory from a monthly Crew Pack is yours to keep forever, even if you stop subscribing.

Q: When do I get my 1,000 V-Bucks?

A: You receive them on the day of your billing date each month. This might be different from the day the new "Crew Pack" skin is released.

title: League of Legends Europe
description: Instantly unlock Champions, Skins, and Battle Passes on EUW/EUNE servers with a Riot RP Gift Card. Secure digital delivery with no expiration—the easiest way to level up your League of Legends experience.
instructions:
Launch the League of Legends client and log in.

Open the Store (coin stack icon) and click the Purchase RP button.

Select the Prepaid Cards & Codes payment method.

Enter your 16-digit PIN exactly (no spaces) and click Submit.
terms:
Region Restricted: Codes can only be activated on accounts registered in Europe (EU West or EU Nordic & East). They will not function on NA, TR, or other regional servers.

Currency Match: The currency on the card (e.g., EUR or GBP) must match the currency setting of your Riot account to avoid redemption errors.

Multi-Game Use: In Europe, these are "Riot Access" codes. While branded for LoL, the currency (Riot Points/RP) can also be used in Teamfight Tactics, Legends of Runeterra, and Valorant (though exchange rates vary).

Non-Refundable: Once the digital PIN is issued or revealed, it is ineligible for return or cash exchange.
faq:
Q: Will this code work for both EUW and EUNE? A: Yes, usually "Europe" gift cards cover both major European shards, provided the currency matches.

Q: Does the card expire? A: Official Riot gift cards for Europe do not have an expiration date.

Q: Can I use part of the card? A: No. The full value of the card is deducted and converted to RP the moment you click submit.

title: Robux Global
description: Redeemable worldwide, this gift card converts instantly to your local currency for Robux or Premium. Includes a free exclusive virtual item and provides the safest way to upgrade your Roblox avatar.
instructions:
Go to roblox.com/redeem in a web browser (you cannot redeem cards via the mobile app or consoles).

Log into your Roblox account.

Enter your PIN code into the white box.

Click Redeem. The value will be added as Roblox Credit.

Click Convert to Robux (or "Use Credit") to turn that balance into in-game currency.
terms:
Automatic Conversion: All Roblox Gift Cards can be redeemed worldwide. When you redeem a card, its value is converted from the original currency (e.g., USD) to your account's local currency based on current exchange rates.

No Expiration: Official Roblox Gift Cards do not have an expiration date and do not charge inactivity fees.

Non-Refundable: Once a code is redeemed to an account, it cannot be transferred, refunded, or exchanged for cash.

Bonus Items: Redemption usually includes one free exclusive Virtual Item (limit one unique item per month per account).
faq:
Q: Can I use a US Dollar card on an EU account? A: Yes. The system will convert the USD value into Euros (or your local currency) automatically at the time of redemption.

Q: Why can't I find the "Redeem" button in the app? A: Roblox requires gift card redemptions to be done through a browser for security and currency processing.

Q: What is the difference between Credit and Robux? A: Credit is real-world money value (like $10) stored on your account. Robux is the virtual currency you buy using that credit.

title: Valorant Europe
description: Instantly recharge your Europe-region account with Valorant Points for exclusive skins and Battle Passes. Secure digital delivery with no expiration—perfect for EU players looking to upgrade their arsenal
instructions:
Log into your VALORANT account on the EU server.

Click the VP icon (top right) next to the Store tab.

Choose Prepaid Cards & Codes from the payment options.

Enter your 16-digit PIN exactly (no spaces) and click Submit.
terms:
Region Locking: These cards are strictly for accounts registered in the Europe region. They will not work on NA, BR, AP, or KR accounts.

Currency Match: The card value (usually in EUR, GBP, or local European currencies) must match the currency of your account's Riot Store.

No Expiration: Official EU Riot Gift Cards generally do not expire, though some third-party retailers may list a "validity period" for their specific digital keys.

Non-Refundable: Once the code is revealed or purchased, it cannot be returned, refunded, or exchanged for cash.
faq:
Q: Can I use a EUR card in the UK? * A: No. Accounts in the UK usually use GBP. The currency on the card must match your store’s currency.

Q: Does it work for League of Legends? * A: Yes. Most EU "Riot Games" cards are multi-game and can be used for RP in League of Legends or Teamfight Tactics if redeemed in those clients.

Q: What if I get a "Not Valid in Your Region" error? * A: This happens if your account is set to a different country (e.g., Turkey or USA). You must contact Riot Support to verify or change your region of residence.

title: Valorant Turkey
description: Unlock Valorant Points instantly for skins and Battle Passes on your Turkey-region account. This digital code provides the best value for local TR players with immediate in-game delivery.
faq:
Q: Can I use this gift card on an EU or NA account? A: No. These cards are strictly region-locked to Turkey (TR). They will only work if your Riot account’s region of residence is set to Turkey and your in-game currency is Turkish Lira (TRY).

Q: Does the code expire? A: Official Riot gift cards for Turkey generally do not expire. However, once the code is revealed or purchased, it is recommended to redeem it promptly to ensure security.

Q: I received an "Invalid Region" error. What should I do? A: This error means your account region does not match the card's region. You must use a Turkey-based account. Riot Support typically cannot change a card’s region or provide a refund for regional mistakes.

Q: Can I use this code for League of Legends or TFT? A: Yes. In the Turkey region, these are often "Riot Access" codes. You can redeem them in the League of Legends or TFT store for RP/Coins, provided the account is also on the Turkey server.
instructions:
Launch VALORANT and log into your Turkey-region account.

Click the VP (Valorant Points) icon located next to the "Store" tab.

Select the Prepaid Cards & Codes payment method from the list.

Carefully input your 16-digit code without spaces and press Submit.
terms: Redeem your Turkish Valorant gift card only on TR-region accounts. Enter the 16-digit code in the "Prepaid Cards & Codes" store tab. Codes are non-refundable and cannot be exchanged for cash once issued. Ensure your account is set to Turkey to avoid regional lock errors.
